Log:
  net/remmina-plugins: Fix portscout

  Before this change, the output of "make -V MASTER_SITES" would start
  with a leading space character, which would break portscout.

  PR:		230965
  Submitted by:	Dmitri Goutnik <dg@syrec.org>
